chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-990 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.23950/2024. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 25.08.2025 Mr. Fazal Mehmood Sherwani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Bilawal Baloch, Manager Legal, Respondent No.4 along with Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, representative of respondent No.4..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Bilawal Baloch, Manager Legal of Respondent No.4 is present and submits that the case of the petitioner will be proceeded and finalized within one month. After such statement, counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition, the same is disposed of; however, it is made clear that if the undertaking of respondent No.4 is not complied, contempt proceedings should be initiated against him. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
